languages.text: "Вот он и сказал, что ему нужны добровольцы для поддержки {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости. И вот мы здесь".
"That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."
languages.original_text: "Вот он и сказал, что ему нужны добровольцы для поддержки {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости. И вот мы здесь".

traits.locale_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."
"That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."
"That's when he announced that he needed volunteers to support the von Valancius operation. So here we are."
"That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."
"That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

languages.text: 「その時、彼はフォン・ヴァランシウス作戦を支援するボランティアを必要としていると発表した。だから、私たちはここにいるんだ」
languages.original_text: "That's when he announced that he needed volunteers to support the von Valancius operation. So here we are."

traits.locale_text: 「その時、彼はフォン・ヴァランシウス作戦を支援するボランティアを必要としていると発表した。だから、私たちはここにいるんだ。」

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ni desteklemek için gönüllülere ihtiyacı olduğunu söyledi. İşte buradayız."
languages.original_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'ni desteklemek için gönüllülere ihtiyacı olduğunu söyledi. İşte buradayız."

languages.text: «Por eso ha dicho que necesitaba voluntarios para apoyarle, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Aquí nos tiene».
languages.original_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

traits.locale_text: «Por eso ha dicho que necesitaba voluntarios para apoyarle, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Aquí nos tiene».

languages.text: “所以他才说需要志愿者来支援大人。于是，我们就来了。”
languages.original_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

traits.locale_text: “所以他才说需要志愿者来支援大人。于是，我们就来了。”

languages.text: « Il a donc lancé un appel à des volontaires pour aller vous prêter main-forte, et nous voilà. »
languages.original_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

traits.locale_text: « Il a donc lancé un appel à des volontaires pour aller vous prêter main-forte, et nous voilà. »

languages.text: "Deshalb sagte er, er braucht Freiwillige, um Euch zu unterstützen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Und hier sind wir."
languages.original_text: "That's why he said he needed volunteers to support Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. So, here we stand."

traits.locale_text: "Deshalb sagte er, er braucht Freiwillige, um Euch zu unterstützen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Und hier sind wir."
